compatibility: Top-level error codes, CLI exit impact, and output-channel policies are public compatibility contract for v2.x.

errors.when_emitted: Effective config violates JSON Schema, contains unknown/removed fields, or violates cross-field invariants.
errors.result_impact: status=failed; document absent; quality absent; annotation_quality present; diagnostics explain config path
errors.stdout_policy: Emit failed JSON only when stdout is the selected output channel and serialization is safe; otherwise keep stdout empty.
errors.stderr_policy: Emit safe human-readable summary only; no JSON payload, traceback, absolute path, or full input text.
errors.output_file_policy: Write failed JSON to selected --output path only when the path is safe and writable; never fall back to stdout after output-file failure.
errors.quality_output_policy: Do not create quality sidecar on failed results.

errors.when_emitted: Input JSON is syntactically malformed, not a supported object, misses required input fields, or violates the consumed input contract.
errors.result_impact: status=failed; document absent; quality absent; diagnostics explain input path when available
errors.stdout_policy: Emit failed JSON only when stdout is the selected output channel and serialization is safe; otherwise keep stdout empty.
errors.stderr_policy: Emit safe human-readable summary only; no JSON payload, traceback, absolute path, or full input text.
errors.output_file_policy: Write failed JSON to selected --output path only when the path is safe and writable; never fall back to stdout after output-file failure.
errors.quality_output_policy: Do not create quality sidecar on failed results.

errors.when_emitted: Input schema_version is present but is not compatible with stanza_annotator.v2.0.
errors.stdout_policy: Emit failed JSON only when stdout is the selected output channel and serialization is safe; otherwise keep stdout empty.
errors.stderr_policy: Emit safe human-readable summary only; no JSON payload, traceback, absolute path, or full input text.
errors.output_file_policy: Write failed JSON to selected --output path only when the path is safe and writable; never fall back to stdout after output-file failure.
errors.quality_output_policy: Do not create quality sidecar on failed results.

errors.when_emitted: Input StanzaAnnotationResult has upstream failed status or an upstream fatal error envelope.
errors.result_impact: status=failed; document absent; quality absent; upstream payload is not exposed as successful document
errors.stdout_policy: Emit failed JSON only when stdout is the selected output channel and serialization is safe; otherwise keep stdout empty.
errors.stderr_policy: Emit safe human-readable summary only; no JSON payload, traceback, absolute path, or full input text.
errors.output_file_policy: Write failed JSON to selected --output path only when the path is safe and writable; never fall back to stdout after output-file failure.
errors.quality_output_policy: Do not create quality sidecar on failed results.
errors.message_template: Upstream stanza_annotator result has failed status: {upstream_code}.

errors.when_emitted: Serialized success result exceeds configured max_output_json_bytes after evaluation.
errors.result_impact: status=failed; document absent; quality absent; emergency failed envelope may exceed configured size limit
errors.stdout_policy: Emit failed JSON only when stdout is the selected output channel and serialization is safe; otherwise keep stdout empty.
errors.stderr_policy: Emit safe human-readable summary only; no JSON payload, traceback, absolute path, or full input text.
errors.output_file_policy: Write failed JSON to selected --output path only when the path is safe and writable; never fall back to stdout after output-file failure.
errors.quality_output_policy: Do not create quality sidecar on failed results.

errors.when_emitted: Selected CLI output channel cannot be written safely due to missing parent, symlink, overwrite, permission, or IO failure.
errors.result_impact: CLI exits before exposing partial output; stdout remains empty when file output was selected
errors.stdout_policy: Emit failed JSON only when stdout is the selected output channel and serialization is safe; otherwise keep stdout empty.
errors.stderr_policy: Emit safe human-readable summary only; no JSON payload, traceback, absolute path, or full input text.
errors.output_file_policy: Write failed JSON to selected --output path only when the path is safe and writable; never fall back to stdout after output-file failure.
errors.quality_output_policy: Do not create quality sidecar on failed results.
errors.message_template: Selected output path cannot be written safely: {path}.

errors.when_emitted: Unexpected implementation error not covered by expected domain/config/input/output failures.
errors.result_impact: status=failed when safe to serialize; otherwise stderr-only safe summary
errors.stdout_policy: Emit failed JSON only when stdout is the selected output channel and serialization is safe; otherwise keep stdout empty.
errors.stderr_policy: Emit safe human-readable summary only; no JSON payload, traceback, absolute path, or full input text.
errors.output_file_policy: Write failed JSON to selected --output path only when the path is safe and writable; never fall back to stdout after output-file failure.
errors.quality_output_policy: Do not create quality sidecar on failed results.

diagnostic_helpers.when_emitted: Config object violates structural JSON Schema before cross-field invariants are checked.
diagnostic_helpers.result_impact: Emitted as a diagnostic helper for top-level error.code = invalid_config; failed wrapper uses the standard failure output contract.

diagnostic_helpers.when_emitted: Config object passes JSON Schema but violates a documented cross-field invariant such as thresholds, weights, or limits.
diagnostic_helpers.result_impact: Emitted as a diagnostic helper for top-level error.code = invalid_config; failed wrapper uses the standard failure output contract.

diagnostic_helpers.when_emitted: Input bytes cannot be parsed as JSON.
diagnostic_helpers.result_impact: Emitted as a diagnostic helper for top-level error.code = invalid_input; failed wrapper uses the standard failure output contract.

diagnostic_helpers.when_emitted: Input JSON object violates the consumed StanzaAnnotationResult schema.
diagnostic_helpers.result_impact: Emitted as a diagnostic helper for top-level error.code = invalid_input; failed wrapper uses the standard failure output contract.
Emitted as a diagnostic helper for top-level error.code = unsupported_stanza_schema; failed wrapper uses the standard failure output contract.
Emitted as a diagnostic helper for top-level error.code = upstream_stanza_annotation_failed; failed wrapper uses the standard failure output contract.
Emitted as a diagnostic helper for top-level error.code = output_too_large; failed wrapper uses the standard failure output contract.

diagnostic_helpers.when_emitted: Selected output channel cannot be written safely.
diagnostic_helpers.result_impact: Emitted as a diagnostic helper for top-level error.code = output_write_failed; failed wrapper uses the standard failure output contract.

diagnostic_helpers.when_emitted: Unexpected runtime exception escapes the expected validation/evaluation paths.
diagnostic_helpers.result_impact: Emitted as a diagnostic helper for top-level error.code = internal_error; failed wrapper uses the standard failure output contract.
